message:
fix(testkit): poll for delayed request arrival in cancellation test

Replace the immediate assertion on mock.received_requests().len() == 1
with a polling loop (up to 50×10ms) that waits for the delayed request
to arrive at wiremock before asserting. The cancellation may win the
race before wiremock records the request, causing a flaky failure.

Also updates Cargo.lock (fcp-sdk entries for new connectors) and
refreshes .beads/issues.jsonl.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
